heroSubtitle: The first interactive K-5 Greek learning platform for families and schools

howItWorksTitle: Learning Greek has never been easier
howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to get started.
step1Desc: Create a free account and your child starts learning immediately.
step2Desc: Interactive lessons with audio, matching games, and instant feedback.
step3Desc: Track progress, earn badges, and climb Mount Olympus together.
feature1Desc: Every letter and word comes with native Greek pronunciation. Kids learn to speak, not just read.
feature2Desc: Earn the Olive Wreath badge, climb Mount Olympus, and collect achievements rooted in Greek culture.
feature3Desc: Mathaino doesn't just teach on screens — it inspires kids to pick up a pencil and practice. Digital lessons build the foundation, real writing makes it stick.
curriculumSubtitle: Structured learning from the Greek alphabet to reading comprehension and cultural awareness.
kindergartenDesc: Greek alphabet, basic vocabulary, simple expressions
grade1Desc: Reading skills, expanded vocabulary, simple sentences
grade2Desc: Reading comprehension, grammar basics, cultural awareness
grade3Desc: Intermediate vocabulary, verb conjugation, Greek history
grade4Desc: Advanced reading, complex grammar, Greek literature
grade5Desc: Fluency building, essay writing, cultural projects
schoolsSubtitle: Give your teachers the tools to teach Greek effectively.
schoolFeature1Desc: Monitor student progress, manage classes, customize content.
schoolFeature2Desc: Join codes, student rosters, automatic grade-level assignment.
schoolFeature3Desc: Starting at $3/student/year. Contact us for a school package.
whyDesc: Greek families in the diaspora face a common challenge — keeping their children connected to their heritage language. Between school, homework, and activities, there's never enough time for Greek. Mathaino was built to solve this. A structured, interactive Greek curriculum that works in just 5 minutes a day. Designed with Greek language educators, every lesson builds on the last — from the alphabet through reading comprehension. No textbooks, no scheduling conflicts. Just open it up, learn together, and watch your child's Greek grow.
diff1Desc: Not a translation. Purpose-built curriculum designed for how Greek is taught in diaspora schools.
diff2Desc: Earn badges named after Greek landmarks. Climb Mount Olympus as you level up. Learn through culturally meaningful content.
diff3Desc: 5 minutes a day is all it takes. Works on any device — phone, tablet, or laptop. No scheduling, no driving to lessons.
pricingSubtitle: Our complete curriculum has no cost. Support us to help more families.
planPaidPeriod: Help keep it free for everyone
faq1A: Modern Greek (Demotic) — the same standard taught in Greek day schools across the diaspora.
faq2A: Kindergarten through Grade 5. We're adding more levels regularly.
faq3Q: Do I need to speak Greek to help my child?
faq3A: No! The platform guides your child through each lesson. English hints are available when needed.
faq4A: Absolutely. No ads, no social features, no external links. Your child only sees learning content. COPPA compliant.
faq5A: Our curriculum is designed for Greek learners in the diaspora and structured to build progressively from the alphabet through reading comprehension. Content is reviewed by Greek language educators for accuracy.
faq6A: Yes! We offer school plans with teacher dashboards and class management. Contact us at schools@mathaino.net.
faq7Q: How long does each lesson take?
faq7A: About 5 minutes. Short enough to fit into any daily routine, long enough to make real progress.
faq8Q: How do I keep my child focused on Mathaino?
faq8A: Use your device's built-in focus mode! On iPad or iPhone, turn on Guided Access (Settings → Accessibility → Guided Access). Once enabled, triple-click the side button while Mathaino is open — your child won't be able to leave the app until you unlock it. On Android, use Screen Pinning (Settings → Security). These features are designed exactly for this and work better than anything we could build into a website.
ctaTitle: Your child's Greek journey starts today
ctaSubtitle: Join families across the diaspora who are keeping the language alive.
